problem.title: CT-ICP seq 05 full: constant-velocity regularization sweep
problem.question: The velocity-only regularizer helped the short seq 07 (1.256 -> 1.168%). Does the same lever transfer to the medium-length seq 05 (2761 frames, prior best 1.122%), or is it short-trajectory only?

variants.label: dense + ceres8 + map50 (existing best, RPE 1.122%)
variants.intent: Confirm the prior seq 05 leaderboard-best recipe.

variants.label: + constant-velocity-weight 0.05 (winner)
variants.intent: Velocity-only smoothing at 0.05; tests transfer from seq 07.
